description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure elevated on short concrete piers, with a wide, overhanging gable roof made of dark corrugated material. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasted by dark wooden beams and a spacious wooden porch that wraps around the front and one side. The porch is accessible via a set of stairs and is enclosed by a wooden railing, providing a sheltered outdoor living space. The roof extends well beyond the walls, offering ample shade and protection from the elements. The building sits on a rectangular grassy plot, bordered by a black base. There are minimal visible windows, with the design emphasizing open porch areas and solid wall sections.
description: A single-story, white-walled bungalow with a wide, dark gable roof and a spacious wooden porch, elevated on concrete piers. The structure features a prominent front staircase and wraparound porch railing.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a solid white wall with no visible windows or doors, and the overhanging dark gable roof.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the open wooden porch, partial railing, and the stairs leading up to the entrance, with the roof extending over the porch.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main entrance with stairs, the full width of the porch, and the symmetrical roof overhang.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the porch extending along the side, with a solid white wall at the end and the roof's deep overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal windows, mostly solid walls with open porch
